body.raw:
{
  "title": "{{blogTitle}}",
  "content": "# Tips for Finding the Perfect Rental\n\nWhen searching for a rental property, keep these tips in mind...",
  "excerpt": "Learn how to find the perfect rental property in Bangladesh",
  "tags": ["rental", "tips", "property"],
  "featuredImage": "https://res.cloudinary.com/demo/image/upload/w_400/sample.jpg"
}

request.description: Get all properties awaiting admin review
Approve a pending property
Reject a pending property with a reason
Admin force-deletes any property
List all owners pending NID verification
Approve owner's NID — sets verified=true and verifiedAt timestamp on OwnerProfile
Revoke a previously verified owner (sets verified=false)
List all reviews flagged for moderation
Hide a flagged review from public view
Re-show a previously hidden review
List all payments with optional status filter
Filter payments by status: SUCCESS | PENDING | REFUNDED | FAILED
Issue a full or partial refund. Omit refundAmount for full refund.
Get all blog posts including unpublished drafts
Create a new blog post (draft by default)

body.raw:
{

}

request.description: Update an existing blog post
Publish a draft blog post (sets publishedAt timestamp)
Unpublish a live blog post (clears publishedAt)
Permanently delete a blog post
Full platform stats: users, properties, bookings, revenue, flagged reviews, banned users
